title: DelegationToken
description: The broker-issued, broker-SIGNED session credential that authorizes an agent_key to speak for a unique human within the Hearme scope. Returned by POST /v1/register after the broker verifies the Self proofs ONCE (verify-once-at-registration, forced by Self's ±1 day proof-freshness window). The agent replays this token in every envelope; the broker verifies its OWN signature + expiry + the registrations registry per answer — no Self proof, no bridge call, no chain access at answer time. Canonical JSON (sorted keys, no whitespace) of this object MINUS broker_signature is the input to broker_signature; canonical JSON of the WHOLE object is the input to delegation_hash = SHA-256(canonical_json(token)). See ARCHITECTURE.md §5/§8.5.

unique_identifier.description: Self nullifier (unique-per-user-per-scope). Verified once at registration; authoritative thereafter. Primary key of the registrations registry.

disclosed_predicates.description: Bucketed demographics derived by the BROKER at registration: {age_band, region}. Never the raw country or DOB.

agent_key.description: base64 Ed25519 public key (32 bytes) bound to unique_identifier in the registry. Verified at registration to equal the proof's userDefinedData.

broker_signature.description: base64 Ed25519 signature by the broker's signing key over canonical_json(token without broker_signature). The agent treats the token as opaque; only the broker can mint or validate it.
